name: client-brief-generator
description: Generates a standardized Client Email Draft Doc from whatever client materials are available (website URL, sales deck, pitch deck, case studies — all optional). Produces the canonical brief that cold-email-generator consumes, annotating gaps with explicit [GAP — upload X] placeholders so account managers know exactly what to strengthen via section refresh. Uses Apify MCP (rag-web-browser, parallel multi-page fetch).
